weight_transform: identity; weight may be a python scalar or a tensor — if tensor, it is cast to input_tensor_a.dtype (weight.to(input_a.dtype)); end tensor is cast to input_a.dtype
applicability_notes: Used in diffusion classifier-free guidance: combined = ttnn.lerp(uncond, cond, guidance_scale) replaces uncond + guidance_scale * (cond - uncond). Supports both scalar-weight overload and full tensor-weight ternary form.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.lerp(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b, weight); constraints: ['all tensor operands must share broadcastable shapes', 'tensor weight is cast to input_a dtype before interpolation', 'accuracy validated to within 2 ULP against torch.lerp']
